query: Simplify the login flow across auth, middleware, and session handling, but tell me first if this needs wider changes.
expected_behavior: Agent recognizes a simplify request but detects ambiguous or cross-module boundaries
Agent does NOT start editing immediately when wider changes may be required
Agent asks for clarification or recommends Analyze first before attempting Apply mode
Agent makes the module-boundary or blast-radius risk explicit
Agent preserves the simplify skill's behavior-first contract
